contracts.title: Red Level Contract: Support VIP Clients
contracts.description:
Looking for a consummate professional to handle a high-stakes job. We’ve got VIP clients at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> who are facing extremely aggressive and motivated outlaws targeting ships around their location. Exact details on the attack are still rolling in, but it appears to be a wide ranging, multi-pronged operation. 

If you’re available, I highly recommend that you bring additional combat support ships, plenty of supplies, and your A-game. Get this right, and we’ll reward the main contractor with a bonus payment of <EM4>24 MG Scrip</EM4>.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

contracts.title: Red Level Contract: Surprise Attack
contracts.description:
We’ve received a handful of comms about recent attacks undertaken by an <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> and its escort ships. After opening a file, we started tracking the ship’s movements and noticed that it frequently passes an emission cloud near <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. We want to use that to our advantage to launch a surprise attack. 

Once on site, you should hide in the emission cloud to cloak your signature enough to allow you to make the first strike. Unfortunately, Foxwell can’t provide additional reinforcements for this operation, so you’ll be responsible for bringing any support forces. You might need the help too. The crew of the [TARGET] is aggressive and battle hardened.        

You get this taken care of for us and there's a bonus payment of <EM4>16 MG Scrip</EM4> in it for the main contractor.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

contracts.title: Red Wind Challenging Cargo Recovery
contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

We’re having trouble completing a hauling mission and need a reliable contractor who has experience working in dangerous environments to complete the job. Just as a heads up, the cargo is in an abandoned ship surrounded by multiple, highly dangerous outlaws. We strongly advise you bring some backup with you and <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to retrieve the client’s goods. Details follow:

RECOVERY LOCATION
     · <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>

DROP OFF LOCATION
     · Freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>

Since this is a bit risky, we’re offering proportionate pay. I’ll leave it up to you to decide how to distribute it to your crew.

TAKE PRIDE IN YOUR WORK – Even as a contractor you are representing Red Wind Linehaul. Do not intentionally do anything to harm the company’s reputation.

contracts.title: Red Wind Challenging Package Recovery
contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Need an experienced pilot for this recovery contract. Unfortunately, the original delivery pilot was targeting by a group of outlaws. Thankfully, the client’s packages are still sitting in their damaged ship located at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>.

You’ll potentially need to <EM4>bring some backup</EM4> with you to ensure the successful collection and delivery of the packages.

PACKAGES TO RECOVER
     · <EM4>4x [ITEM1]</EM4>

DROP OFF LOCATION
     · Deliver to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>

Considering the danger of this contract, we’re willing to offer a slight pay increase as hazard pay.

TAKE PRIDE IN YOUR WORK – Even as a contractor you are representing Red Wind Linehaul. Do not intentionally do anything to harm the company’s reputation.

contracts.title: Red Wind Dangerous Cargo Recovery
contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Putting out a call for a highly skilled pilot who can recover our client’s cargo. Please only accept this contract if you have experience dealing with extremely hostile situations involving multiple combatants. Additional crew members and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> are highly recommended.

RECOVERY LOCATION
     · <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>

DROP OFF LOCATION
     · Freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>

The cargo should be in the bay of the abandoned ship. The client has already expressed frustration regarding the cargo’s delay so please work quickly and efficiently.

BE RESILIENT – Life is hard and sometimes you have to roll with the punches. Keep going and don’t let it bring you down.

contracts.title: Red Wind Dangerous Package Recovery
contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

We appreciate how hard you’ve been working for us recently, which is why we’d like to offer you this advanced contract. An important client of ours is waiting for delivery on multiple packages but the courier due to deliver them is no longer responding. The package trackers are showing that they’re at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, meaning we have some time to recover the delivery.

PACKAGES TO RECOVER
     · <EM4>5x [ITEM1]</EM4>

DROP OFF LOCATION
     · Deliver to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>

We cannot stress enough how important the success of this delivery is. Since we do not know what happened to the original courier, we strongly urge you to travel with <EM4>several trustworthy combat pilots.</EM4>

Needless to say, we’re offering a substantial payout for this one proportionate to the danger of the contract.

TAKE PRIDE IN YOUR WORK – Even as a contractor you are representing Red Wind Linehaul. Do not intentionally do anything to harm the company’s reputation.

contracts.title: Red Wind Easy Cargo Recovery
contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

One of our haulers ran into some engine trouble whilst transporting some cargo for us and was forced to abandon their ship. Looking for a contractor who can recover the cargo and complete the delivery. You’ll need to bring your own <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to transport the cargo to your ship. Details below.

RECOVERY LOCATION
     · <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>

DROP OFF LOCATION
     · Freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>

Be advised, the recovery location hasn’t been verified as safe. You might find an opportunistic outlaw trying to take the cargo for themselves, so be on alert.

TAKE PRIDE IN YOUR WORK – Even as a contractor you are representing Red Wind Linehaul. Do not intentionally do anything to harm the company’s reputation.

contracts.title: Red Wind Easy Package Recovery
contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Seems a pilot of ours ran into some trouble and left a client’s delivery unfulfilled. We suspect they may no longer be with us, but it’s important that we continue to offer outstanding levels of service and complete the job. If you accept, please head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> to pick up the packages. Be advised you may encounter some <EM4>opportunistic outlaws</EM4> near the derelict ship.

PACKAGES TO RECOVER
     · <EM4>2x [ITEM1]</EM4>

DROP OFF LOCATION
     · Deliver to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>

TAKE PRIDE IN YOUR WORK – Even as a contractor you are representing Red Wind Linehaul. Do not intentionally do anything to harm the company’s reputation.

contracts.title: Red Wind Package Recovery
contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

A contractor of ours has run into some trouble and abandoned their ship over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. We need someone to head to their ship, pick up the package they left there, and finish the job.

PACKAGES TO RECOVER
     · <EM4>1x [ITEM1]</EM4>

DROP OFF LOCATION
     · Deliver to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>

We’re currently uncertain as to why they failed to complete the contract, so be cautious when approaching the ship.

TAKE PRIDE IN YOUR WORK – Even as a contractor you are representing Red Wind Linehaul. Do not intentionally do anything to harm the company’s reputation.

contracts.title: Red Wind Seeking New Couriers
contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Red Wind is excited to announce that we are looking to hire new couriers to help with deliveries across the ’verse. We pride ourselves on been a flexible company that’s eager to meet the needs of all clients, everywhere. We’ll ask no questions; if you want it there, we’ll get it there. If that sounds like you, we have an introductory contract to see if you’re the right fit.

We need a resilient new hire to head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, recover the package abandoned by a former employee, and finish the delivery.

PACKAGES TO RECOVER
     · <EM4>1x [ITEM1]</EM4>

DROP OFF LOCATION
     · Deliver to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>

If you’re able to handle this contract we’d be delighted to send you more courier opportunities.

TAKE PRIDE IN YOUR WORK – Even as a contractor you are representing Red Wind Linehaul. Do not intentionally do anything to harm the company’s reputation.

contracts.title: Red Wind Seeking New Haulers
contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Red Wind is looking to bolster our roster of haulers in Pyro. It takes a special pilot to want to do runs in a system as unpredictable as this one. Need someone who can keep their wits about them and keep quiet. If you check those boxes, and have a ship that can handle <EM4>8 SCU cargo containers</EM4>, then give this trial run a shot.  

PICK UP
Freight elevator at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. 

DROP OFF
Freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Complete this contract and we’ll send more hauling opportunities your way. And don't forget to pack a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to bring along.

contracts.title: Red Wind Seeking New Haulers
contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Red Wind is looking to bolster our roster of haulers in Pyro. It takes a special pilot to want to do runs in a system as unpredictable as this one. Need someone who can keep their wits about them and keep quiet. If you check those boxes, and have a ship that can handle <EM4>4 SCU cargo containers</EM4>, then give this trial run a shot.  

PICK UP
Freight elevator at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. 

DROP OFF
Freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Complete this contract and we’ll send more hauling opportunities your way. And don't forget to pack a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to bring along.

contracts.title: Red Wind Special Cargo Recovery
contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

We have a special assignment for only the most competent contractors. One of our haulers who is sadly no longer with us failed to complete their last job. The cargo they were supposed to deliver is sitting stationery in their former ship in the location listed below.

RECOVERY LOCATION
     · <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>

DROP OFF LOCATION
     · Freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>

I’m not going dance around the issue, this is an extremely challenging job. You’ll need to bring a strong team of skilled pilots with you to deal with the outlaws that killed the previous contractor and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to retrieve the client’s cargo. That said, if you take on this contract, we will make it worth your time.

HOW DID WE DO – Complete our short feedback survey on our Spectrum page for a chance to enter our monthly prize draw.

contracts.title: Red Wind Straightforward Cargo Recovery
contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

A Red Wind hauler has been ambushed by some outlaws and now our clients’ cargo is sitting still whilst they prepare to steal it. We need a pilot with a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> and a combat ready ship to head to the location below and recover the cargo before it’s gone for good.

RECOVERY LOCATION
     · <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>

DROP OFF LOCATION
     · Freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>

The pilot reported multiple hostiles so make sure you take this seriously. 

EVERY OPPORTUNITY COUNTS – Make the most of what’s given to you, show us that you can handle more work.

contracts.title: Red Wind Straightforward Package Recovery
contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Outlaws are making our jobs much harder to complete these days. We need a contractor with combat experience to head to our former delivery pilot’s ship location at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and recover the packages left there.

PACKAGES TO RECOVER
     · <EM4>3x [ITEM1]</EM4>

DROP OFF LOCATION
     · Deliver to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>

While you're out there, be on the lookout for trouble, we’re getting <EM4>reports of multiple outlaws</EM4> in the vicinity.

TAKE PRIDE IN YOUR WORK – Even as a contractor you are representing Red Wind Linehaul. Do not intentionally do anything to harm the company’s reputation.

contracts.title: Reduce Outlaw's Operational Readiness
contracts.description:
There is a group of outlaws at [LOCATION] that have become increasingly brazen in their attacks on Citizens for Prosperity assets in the system. 

To minimize loss of life, we want to first try convincing them to move on to somewhere else by disabling their generators and destroying their fuel reserves. 

Hopefully, that should be enough to convince them to move on to greener pastures.

Thanks,
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Reduce Overpopulation
contracts.description:
We’ve been monitoring a situation at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> regarding an uptick in the <EM4>[CREATURE]</EM4> population over the past few months. Our models indicate that if this continues many of the native plants and animals will be adversely affected. It’s imperative that the <EM4>[CREATURE]</EM4> population is reduced before that happens.     

If you can help, please refer to <EM4>"The Guide to Stanton Wildlife"</EM4> in your Journal for more specifics on the targeted creature.

Best,

Wanda Werkheiser
Contract Manager
Highpoint Wilderness Specialists

contracts.title: Repel Raiders
contracts.description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Defend Location
APPROVAL CODE = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

There’s a serious problem brewing for one of our clients at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. They’ve been warned that a highly skilled outlaw crew has their sights set on overrunning and occupying that location. We’ve been hired to make sure that doesn’t happen. 

Need a contractor to deploy to the location immediately. Based on the intel provided by the client, this won’t be a walk in the park. We strongly advise you to bring allies and plenty of supplies to help ward of the impending attack.   

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

contracts.title: Reprisal Attack
contracts.description:
A squad of ships recently shanked one of our convoys, and ten credits says they’re gonna try and do it again. Looking for someone to launch a reprisal attack before that can happen.  

We’ve ID’d the idiots as consisting of several large craft and a sizable escort. We believe the leader is flying a <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> and set that ship as the primary target. Since it’s a sizable and aggressive squad, a surprise attack seems like a smart play. They often pass by <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, which has an emission cloud to hide in. Be smart and patient then strike when the time is right. 

Unless you fancy yourself a real ace, it’s probably best to bring some friends. Maybe you can entice folks by letting them know they can pick through the wreckage for valuables once the deed is done.

And on top of that, I'll give the main contractor a bonus <EM4>8 Council Scrip</EM4> to sweeten the pot.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Reputation Management
contracts.description:
Some assholes are refusing to pay us what we’re owed. Problem is, these idiots are bragging about it. Had they kept it quiet, we could’ve taken care of this more surgically, but now we need to send a message.

The fools are operating from [LOCATION]. We need them all gone. Make it as loud as you can. We’ll send your payment once everyone’s taken care of.

- Stows out.

contracts.title: Requesting Help
contracts.description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Clear Location
APPROVAL CODE = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Got an emergency request from Associated Science & Development for any available operators to report to [LOCATION] and deal with some hostiles who have overtaken one of their facilities. 

Once on site, you will need to engage and eliminate any hostile elements. ASD has indicated that this facility provides shuttle services to one of their embedded research centers but were very clear that you are not authorized to travel there. Trespassers will be shot and you will be no exception, so stick to the prescribed AO.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

contracts.title: Respond to Distress Beacon
contracts.description:
A Citizens for Prosperity convoy on a resupply run dropped a distress beacon near <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. They’re not answering any comms, so I assume the situation is serious. That convoy has some skilled pilots, so if they’re not responding then they definitely need the help.

We’ll compensate you to support that convoy.  

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Restore Order at [LOCATION]
contracts.description:
Our crew at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> needs help. Enemy ships are swarming the area and attacking anything and everything they can find. That’d be bad enough as is, but this site has some absolutely crucial gear and personnel that we can’t have destroyed or compromised. 

Considering the size and scale of the attack, you’re gonna need a fully supplied ship and some reliable wingmen. Gather your crew, fly out to the site, and I’ll send you specifics on where you’re needed most.

To prove just how serious we are about getting this done right, the main contractor will earn a bonus <EM4>24 Council Scrip</EM4> for making sure absolutely nothing goes wrong.

- Stow

contracts.title: Restore Order at [LOCATION]
contracts.description:
Our crew at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> needs help. Enemy ships are swarming the area and attacking anything and everything they can find. That’d be bad enough as is, but this site has some absolutely crucial gear and personnel that we can’t have destroyed or compromised. 

Considering the size and scale of the attack, you’re gonna need a fully supplied ship and some reliable wingmen. Gather your crew, fly out to the site, and I’ll send you specifics on where you’re needed most.

To prove just how serious we are about getting this done right, the main contractor will earn a bonus <EM4>24 Council Scrip</EM4> for making sure absolutely nothing goes wrong.

- Stow

contracts.title: Retaking Outposts from Headhunters
contracts.description:
Citizens for Prosperity is looking for any available security operatives to retake several former CFP installations near [LOCATION] from Headhunter control. These clusters were violently taken from us by [TARGET] and resulted in the deaths of many volunteers.

Bringing these outposts back under our control will help provide more stability to the system. Reports indicate that [TARGET] tends to hide behind their rank and file, so they will likely appear once you've cleared out most of the hostiles.

XenoThreat are trained and motivated so they will not give up easily.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Retrieval Op
contracts.description:
You got a ship and <EM4>a heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4>? Good. I’ve got work for you.

Don’t know how they knew we were coming, but one of my haulers got jumped over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. The pilot’s gone silent so I assume they’ve been ghosted, but the cargo tracker is stationery for now.

Expect the bastards who took out my pilot to still be around, so bring backup. Get the cargo and get out, don’t need to risk anymore good haulers on this mess.

Get the goods to the freight elevator to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and I’ll send your payment.

-Twitch

contracts.title: Retrieve Additional Smuggler Intel
contracts.description:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Outlaws present and armed
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ship, Personal Arms
Briefing: InterSec needs your services once again.

The intel you previously gathered has been invaluable in identifying several prominent buyers of the illegally-obtained Vanduul parts. However, since then the Shattered Blade have continued their operations and the UEE is requesting that we <EM4>update our intel.</EM4>

We believe more information can be retrieved from the storage facilities located at the old <EM4>QV Logistics station.</EM4>

The operation parameters haven’t changed since your last mission: find the <EM4>encrypted data</EM4> and use the <EM4>decryption key</EM4> to decipher and upload the list to us. The Shattered Blade will have reinforced the area since the last time, so expect resistance.

Good luck. We’ll be in touch.

Respectfully,

Deacon Tobin
Operations Manager
InterSec Defense Solutions

This communication consists of confidential information solely intended for the recipient. Please disregard if received in error and notify sender. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to UEE and system law where applicable.

contracts.title: Risky [SHIP] Salvage Job
contracts.description:
We’ve got our eye on a [SHIP] near [LOCATION] that’s ripe for salvaging. We’re too busy to snag it ourselves, so why not spread the wealth, right?

If you send us some credits, we’ll send you the ship’s exact coordinates. Don’t take too long to think it over, though. You’ve probably got about [TIMER] minutes until security gets there to check out the wreck. Could be more, could be less.

You could either tow it somewhere else first, or you could try to scrap what you can onsite before security shows. Don’t care which as long as you get it taken care of. And once you've salvaged everything you want, just go ahead and abandon this contract to clear your map. Helps keep everything nice and tidy.

contracts.title: Rookie Hauler Needed for Direct Bulk Shipment
contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Have a run here that could become a lucrative regular thing if we can pull it off.  This’ll take you into Pyro, so you’ll have to be ready to tangle with some of the locals. 

You’ll need to grab the stuff from <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, make the jump to Pyro, and then get to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. 

All you need to do is bring a ship with space for <EM4>24 SCU cargo containers</EM4>, a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>, and be ready to do some damage if someone picks a fight with you.

contracts.title: Rookie Hauler Needed for Direct Bulk Shipment
contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Guess some companies see danger when offered a run in Pyro. We see profits. Got one here that starts in the system at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and then goes to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.  

The client warned us that outlaws in Pyro regularly target this run, which has scared other hauling concerns. Be sure your ship is all geared up and can hold <EM4>24 SCU cargo containers</EM4>. And don't forget to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>.

contracts.title: Rookie Hauler Needed for Direct Bulk Shipment
contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Got a contract from a major client who needs a skilled pilot to move a large load of luxury items from <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. 

You'll need room for at least <EM4>8 SCU cargo containers</EM4> in your hold. You'll also need a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to get everything loaded and unloaded. 

And as a fair warning, the things you'll be carrying are pricey enough that you might attract some unwanted attention. <EM4>Be ready to defend yourself</EM4> if you can't evade.

contracts.title: Rookie Hauler Needed for Direct Small Shipment
contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------  

Need a pilot for a straightforward haul going from the freight elevator at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. Should be easy enough as long as you got a ship that can handle containers up to <EM4>4 SCU</EM4> in size. 

Credits don't come much easier than this. Just be careful as the route's not exactly in the safest of sectors. And don't forget to pack a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to bring along.

contracts.title: Rookie Hauler Needed for Large Shipment
contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Red Wind needs an experienced pilot to transport a large shipment of raw revenant tree pollen from <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> to these locations:

DROP OFF LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)

[SINGLETOMULTITOKEN]

This might seems self-evident, but the rep from CFP asked us to assure you that it's okay under UEE law to transport revenant tree pollen as long as it hasn't been processed. 

Be sure that your ship can carry up to <EM4>16 SCU cargo containers</EM4> before you accept the contract. And buy a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> if you don't have one already to make loading and unloading as painless as possible.

contracts.title: Rookie Hauler Needed for Large Shipment
contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

CFP has an urgent request for a pilot with combat experience. A few of their settlements are under immediate threat and may soon be under attack, so they need supplies ASAP. 

If you're confident that you can navigate a potential combat zone, please head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, grab the cargo, and bring it to these locations:

DROP OFF LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)

[SINGLETOMULTITOKEN]

You'll need enough room for <EM4>16 SCU cargo containers</EM4>, and your own <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to get everything loaded and unloaded.

Keep in mind that it's always best to run if someone tries to ambush you. But if you get cornered, don't hesitate to defend yourself.

contracts.title: Rookie Hauler Needed for Medium Shipment
contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Got a request from a farmer in Pyro for specialized agricultural supplies - namely, ranta dung. Apparently, normal fertilizers aren't cutting it. They've put in orders from multiple distributors and need someone to bring everything back to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Here are all the places you can collect the dung:

PICK UP LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)

 [MULTITOSINGLETOKEN]

The client says your ship needs to be able to carry at least <EM4>8 SCU cargo containers</EM4>. Don't forget to bring your own <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> for loading and unloading.

contracts.title: Rookie Hauler Needed for Small Shipment
contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------   

One of the folks over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> just hit me up about a pile of cargo, <EM4>4 SCU</EM4> or smaller, that needs to be hauled out to a few different spots.   

DROP OFF LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)  
- [LOCATION 1]
- [LOCATION 2]  

I'm trusting you to set your own route here, so don't mess it up. And try to stay away from anywhere too dangerous. And don't forget to pack a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to bring along.

contracts.title: Rookie Hauler Needed for Small Shipment
contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------   

One of the folks over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> just hit me up about a pile of cargo, <EM4>4 SCU</EM4> or smaller, that needs to be hauled out to a few different spots.   

DROP OFF LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)  
- [LOCATION 1]
- [LOCATION 2]
- [LOCATION 3]  

I'm trusting you to set your own route here, so don't mess it up. And try to stay away from anywhere too dangerous. And don't forget to pack a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to bring along.

contracts.title: RSI Meteor Mod
contracts.description: Meteor big. It heavy. Have many guns. But Wikelo figure out way to make even better. You have things I will take to do.\n\nThat is all.

contracts.title: Rush Salvage Job on XenoThreat Ship
contracts.description:
Hey,

Moments ago, a XenoThreat [SHIP] broadcast a distress call near [LOCATION]. They were requesting reinforcements and then suddenly went dark, so it doesn’t sound like they survived. That means there’s a valuable ship sitting there waiting to be salvaged, if someone can get to it fast.   

None of our Citizens for Prosperity forces can head there now, so I’m looking to sell the coordinates to someone who can. There’s good creds to be made, maybe even some cargo and components to salvage, if you can stomach the risk of potentially running into XenoThreat reinforcements. 

Buying these coordinates will help the CFP fund our operation here. Plus, you get to profit off that downed ship instead of XenoThreat. What do you say?

Fly safe,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Salvage Ships and Cargo
contracts.description:
Hi,

Got a comm from a local letting us know that they spotted some destroyed CFP ships near [LOCATION]. After reviewing the specifics, I’m convinced it’s the remnants of a cargo convoy that went missing last week. While it’s obviously unfortunate to confirm they didn’t make it, I guess there’s a silver lining here in that the ships are still in a salvageable state. 

Based on the local’s comm, the site doesn’t appear to have been worked yet. There may even be some components and cargo still on the ships. That convoy was carrying some valuable stuff. Would be worth looking for if you really want to maximize your investment.

If you’re interested, we can sell you the specific coordinates so you can salvage the site.

Fly safe,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Salvage Wrecked Ships on the Drift
contracts.description:
Got word there’s a few ships near [LOCATION] just floating all by their lonesome. It’s good salvage, but none of our crews have the time right now. We figured to give you first snap at it.

If you want the coords, we’ll sell them to you for a price. Then you’re free to pick the wreck as clean as you like and sell it all for a tidy profit. Now, you might run into some trouble out there from rival scavs, but I’m sure it won’t be anything you can’t handle.

- Smokey

contracts.title: Salvager Needed (Lrg. Special Order of RMC / UCM / Components)
contracts.description:
Adagio Holdings
A Proud Equal Opportunity Employer

> About the job <
To help satisfy a recent special order, we are seeking contractors to help source Recycled Material Composite (RMC), unrefined Construction Materials (Rubble, Pieces, or Salvage), and components by stripping and fracturing abandoned ships; removing the requested parts by hand with a <EM4>tractor beam</EM4>.  

We recommend searching for wreckage at Lagrange points, maybe in one of Nyx's asteroid belts, or you could purchase a salvage claim from us in your Contract Manager. We advise extra caution since there have been Vanduul sightings in the system, especially with how long it might take for you to track down this specific order.  

Once acquired, deliver the materials to the freight elevator located at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

For advice on salvaging, consult <EM4>A Salvager's Guide to Material Collection</EM4> in your mobiGlas journal.

> Requirements <
     - Any class/size of salvage ship
     - A handheld tractor beam

> Disclaimer <
Contractors are responsible for ensuring that they are collecting materials from vehicles that are considered fair salvage under the pursuant UEE laws. Adagio Holdings is in no way liable for any crimes or misdemeanors committed by contractors and will offer no compensation or reparation for any persons affected by these actions.

To help satisfy a recent small-scale order, we are seeking contractors to help source Recycled Material Composite (RMC) by  stripping abandoned ships. We recommend searching for wreckage at Lagrange points or you could purchase a salvage claim from us in your Contract Manager.

Once acquired, deliver the materials to the freight elevator located at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

For advice on salvaging, consult <EM4>A Salvager's Guide to Material Collection</EM4> in your mobiGlas journal.

> Requirements <
     - Any class/size of salvage ship

> Disclaimer <
Contractors are responsible for ensuring that they are collecting materials from vehicles that are considered fair salvage under the pursuant UEE laws. Adagio Holdings is in no way liable for any crimes or misdemeanors committed by contractors and will offer no compensation or reparation for any persons affected by these actions.

contracts.title: Savage and Salvage
contracts.description:
A group of ships are terrorizing Headhunters forces around [LOCATION]. There’s concern someone within the gang might be feeding them intel, so I want to hire someone from outside our ranks to wipe them out. 

Wanna keep this all under wraps by structuring it as a salvage contract. Here’s how it’ll work. I’ve got a trusted scout keeping an eye on the ships. Send us a nominal salvage finder’s fee and I’ll let you know exactly where these bastards are. You head there, deliver the justice they deserve, and then, boom, there’s a salvage field worth of valuable goods for you to pick apart as payment. Sounds like a win-win to me. You interested?     

Stows out.

contracts.title: Save Ship
contracts.description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Defend Ship
APPROVAL CODE = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

A client is reporting trouble near <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Based on their comms, it doesn’t sound like an organized, professional attack. Still, we’re paid to provide protection and it’s been requested. 

Need a contractor to fly there and secure the situation.

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

contracts.title: Scout and Scan
contracts.description:
Headhunters have been expanding, but still need help getting a lay of our new territory. I’ve got a run to check spots we want scanned ready to go. 

This one kicks off at the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD and will look at a few more locations after that, but I’ll update you as we clear them out. Not expecting you to run into any trouble but no guarantees. Trouble seems to follow us.

Get this done and I'll toss the main contractor <EM4>4 Council Scrip</EM4> as a thanks.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Secure Our Airspace
contracts.description:
Our airspace around <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> has been compromised. Enemy ships are threatening the base and any of our ships in the area. Gotta put a stop to this immediately, so get your shit in order and get over there. Just get going and I’ll update you with any relevant info on where you’re needed. 
 
If you need any extra motivation, I’m adding a bonus <EM4>8 Council Scrip</EM4> for the main contractor.

- Stows

APPROVAL CODE = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

A client has intercepted comms between gang members and discovered that they’re planning an attack on <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Now they need our help to ensure the attack isn’t successful.   

Looking for a contractor who can defend the location from this offensive. Don’t have any specifics on the outlaws, but doubt they’re that skilled if our client cracked their comms so easily. 

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

contracts.description:

APPROVAL CODE = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

contracts.title: See What’s Out There
contracts.description:
Headhunters want some intel on what’s happening around territory. We’ve already set up some monitoring satellites, but nothing beats a good ol’ patrol. You up for it?

If so, get on over to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD. Start by scanning that region and then we’ll guide you to a few more spots that we want info on. 

And if you needed some extra motivation, there's a bonus of <EM4>2 Council Scrip</EM4> for the main contractor at the end of the job. 

- Stows

contracts.title: SEEK AND DESTROY ASD DATA
contracts.description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Destroy Server
APPROVAL CODE = VS-14

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Client has requested a discreet contractor to infiltrate <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, locate a group of servers, and destroy the information stored on them permanently.

The client was able to share the location of the servers within the facility: the <EM4>Control Center in the Engineering wing</EM4>. The site has officially been shuttered, but there still may be hostile forces there. Be on your guard.

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

contracts.title: Seeking Experienced Combat Pilots
contracts.description:
Citizens for Prosperity is in need of pilots with dogfighting experience. If you’re looking to put your skills to the test, I have a mission here for you to try. 

A civilian ship has requested combat support near <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Head there and show us that you have the skills to excel in these types of missions and we’ll put you to good use.  

Please be aware. This mission is not a training exercise. This is a real encounter, so please do your best to save the ship in distress. 

Good Luck,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Senior Hauler Needed for Large Shipment
contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------   

They're doing a clean out at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and have a bunch of <EM4>32 SCU</EM4> or smaller waste containers that needs to be hauled out to a few different spots. (Don't ask me why. They're paying us is all I know.)

DROP OFF LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)  
- [LOCATION 1]
- [LOCATION 2]

And don't forget to pack a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to bring along.

contracts.title: Setting a Trap
contracts.description:
Got an opportunity for someone eager to show off their flying skills. Headhunters have been running afoul of this numbrain flying a<EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> and we’re gonna put a stop to it once and for all.

You’re gonna help us set a trap for them. See, there’s an <EM4>emission cloud</EM4> near <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> that they fly by frequently. 

Head there, hide inside the cloud by powering down your ship, and attack the asshole as soon as you see ‘em and other single-seaters dumb enough to fly with them. It’ll be all you for that first hit, but we’ll put some support ships nearby to help finish the job. 

And in honor of this being your first surprise attack for us, there's a bonus of <EM4>1 Council Scrip</EM4> for the main contractor at the end of the job. 

Stows out.

contracts.title: Settle a Score
contracts.description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Ship Ambush
APPROVAL CODE = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

One of our clients has been the victim of consistent harassment so the time has come to send a clear cease-and-desist message by taking out their prized <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>.  The lowlife in question follows a fairly predictable routine making them susceptible to an ambush. We’ve identified <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> as the ideal spot. It features an <EM4>emission cloud</EM4> where you can hide and power down your ship while waiting. 

By the way, the <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> often flies alone but is sometimes joined by a friend in a single-seat ship. Neither should give you too much trouble, but we have other contractors in the area who can lend a hand once you strike.

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract. There’s a bonus payment of <EM4>1 MG Scrip</EM4> in this for the main contractor too.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

contracts.title: Shepherd's Rest under attack
contracts.description:
We just received word that Headhunters are attacking a CFP installation near [LOCATION]. Though resorting to violence will only perpetuate the problems in the system, we won't let innocent people be killed, so we're looking for quality combat specialists to help protect the people there.

Good luck,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Shiny Builder Suit
contracts.description: You need utility suit. Good for work. If you like, Wikelo can make shinier. Look real good. See what Wikelo need and bring.

contracts.title: Ship Needs Emergency Assistance
contracts.description:
A Citizens for Prosperity affiliated ship was attempting to deliver some supplies to [LOCATION] when they were attacked by the recipients who didn't want to pay for their purchase and chose violence instead.

I'll instruct our traders to be more careful about who they deal with in the future, but for now, I would really appreciate you lending them a hand in fighting off these attackers. 

Appreciated,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Ship Needs Emergency Assistance
contracts.description:
A Citizens for Prosperity affiliated ship was attempting to deliver some supplies to [LOCATION] when they were attacked by the recipients who didn't want to pay for their purchase and chose violence instead.

Appreciated,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Shot in the chaos
contracts.description:
My boss is looking for an available hitter. Headhunters are looking to retake [LOCATION]. The CFP Mercs there have been digging in for a long fight. Look, we don't want to kill anyone we don't have to, so we're looking into other options.

Security there's being run by [TARGET] and my Judge thinks that if they're taken out, the rest'll scatter. Shedding a little blood's better than a lot, right?

-Stows

contracts.title: Show Them Who's Boss
contracts.description:
Word’s gotten out that we’re expanding into Stanton and a local crew has hit a few of our safe houses. We managed to track the bastards back to some old Hathor mining site. 

You up for showing them how the Headhunters handle things? If so, head over to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and show them that we mean business. 

 
- Stows

contracts.title: Shut Off Power at [LOCATION]
contracts.description: This is a fairly straightforward job. We got some assholes at [LOCATION] who have been thinking they're better than they are. Go and shut off their power to remind them that Headhunters are in charge.\n\n-Stows out

contracts.title: Shut Off Power at [LOCATION]
contracts.description: This is a fairly straightforward job. We got some assholes at [LOCATION] who have been thinking they're better than they are. Go and shut off their power to remind them that Headhunters are in charge.\n\n-Stows out

contracts.title: Shutdown CFP’s Comms
contracts.description:
CFP think they’re safe over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> but we got big plans for them. You’re gonna pave the way for us by heading there and shutting down their comm towers.

There should be a <EM4>control terminal at the top</EM4> that you can use to shut the tower down. You get that sorted and they won’t be able to call for backup. Then we can show those skags who this system belongs to.

Most outposts use the same system, so this’ll come in handy next time you want to make sure reinforcements don’t mess with you.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Shutdown Xenothreat Comm Towers
contracts.description:
Citizens for Prosperity are eager to help the people of Pyro, and it starts with freeing them from the grasp of XenoThreat.

We’re preparing a team to infiltrate one of their outposts, but we need someone to go in ahead to take out their communication towers first. Once those towers are offline, they won’t be able to call for reinforcements and we can proceed with our plan.

Head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and find the towers. At the <EM4>top is a control panel</EM4> that can be used to disable them.

Also, it’s worth noting that most outposts use a similar system, so you’ll know how to disable the comms towers rather than risk fighting reinforcement dropships when you’re doing other jobs.

Good luck,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Silence the Xenothreat
contracts.description:
We’re making a play to hit some XenoThreat assholes where it hurts but need to be smart about it. That’s why we’re sending you in first to take out their comm towers so they can’t call for backup. You do that and we can be in and out before they know it.

Head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and climb the comm towers there. Should be a <EM4>control panel at the top</EM4> you can use to switch them off.

In fact, same goes for most other outposts. Rather than having to deal with reinforcements, you can just turn off the comm towers. But hey, if you wanna ring the bell to ghost a few more Xenothreat I ain’t complaining.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Silent Strike
contracts.description:
Any interest in taking out a <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> for us? 

Shouldn’t be too much trouble. We’ve already done the legwork and figured out that they're scheduled to pass by <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> soon. Just go dark in the nearby emission cloud and you’ll get a good jump on ‘em.  

They might roll through solo or with some friends. All would be single-seaters but they can hold their own in a dogfight. We’ll drop some forces in the region who can provide support once the fun starts.

You pull this off and I'll toss <EM4>3 Council Scrip</EM4> to the main contractor for a job well done.

- Stows

contracts.title: Simple Hit
contracts.description:
Got another scumbag who needs their ticket punched. [TARGET] is just a low level thug who doesn't seem to learn. We've warned them to either throw in with us or move system, but they don't seem to be listening so we're out of patience.

Head to [LOCATION] and you should find [TARGET] flying around. 

Stows out.

contracts.title: Small Purchase Order: Hand Mined Materials
contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>[SYSTEM] </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Due to changes in our sourcing pipeline, Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to purchase a variety of materials from independent miners operating in the area. While selling at a trade hub may net you a more competitive price than fulfilling our order, many miners find that strengthening their ties to Shubin to be a wise long-term investment for their career.

[LOCATION] For a comprehensive list of where to find these minerals, consult <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #2: Where to Mine</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal. While you're there, feel free to read the first part <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #1: Basic Overview</EM4> if you want a refresher on how to get the materials.

Since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>[MULTITOOL]</EM4>.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract."

contracts.title: Sneaky Stabber
contracts.description: Have the pieces to build useful ship for people who like to sneak then fight. Take F8C ship and make even better. Have put what Wikelo will need to build for you. Now you decide. Bye.

itemRewards.name: Anvil F8C Lightning Wikelo Sneak Special

contracts.title: Sneaky Starfighter Ion
contracts.description: Starfighter Ion good ship, but it could be more sneak, yes? Surprise your not friends when you shoot them. I help with this for you. I need the right items and then I can give to you. Bring to me. Bye.

itemRewards.name: Crusader Ares Star Fighter Ion Wikelo Sneak Special

contracts.title: Snow Snipe
contracts.description:
Want to shoot long away and stay hiding. But it snowing? Wikelo have gun for you.

Bring things. I give.

Bye.

choices.name: Zenith Laser Sniper Rifle Battery (22 Cap)

contracts.title: Space Patrol
contracts.description:
The local Clip wants current intel on several of our sectors. Not sure what they’re looking for but I’m not about to ask. My job is to find someone willing to swing through and scan these locations. You available? 

All you need to do is head to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD, run a scan, and if it’s clear, move to the next spot. If you run into any issues, take care of it. 

Ain’t sound too tough now does it? Plus, I'll give the main contractor a bonus <EM4>8 Council Scrip</EM4> as thanks. 

Stows out.

contracts.title: Special Idris For Killing
contracts.description: Since Wikelo has done good business with you, make you this very special trade. Idris is a powerful ship perfect for big important person like you. Wikelo has even done mod to make it more dangerous! Bring me a few items and the ship is yours.

contracts.title: Special Purchase Order: Mined Materials
contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>[SYSTEM] </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for a variety of refined materials. This purchase order is more complex than typical, requiring multiple mining methods, but since you've proven your skill thus far, we think you and your team are up for the challenge.

Reminder, <EM4>materials must be refined before delivery</EM4>, and since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>[MULTITOOL]</EM4>.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>[SYSTEM] </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for a variety of refined materials. This purchase order is more complex than typical, requiring multiple mining methods, but since you've proven your skill thus far, we think you and your team are up for the challenge.

Reminder, <EM4>materials must be refined before delivery</EM4>, and since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>[MULTITOOL]</EM4>.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: Spirit Cargo mod
contracts.description: Wikelo love useful cargo ship. Spirit is very useful. If you want one, can make for you. Just bring me things and I will do. Bye.

contracts.title: Stand Our Ground
contracts.description:
We’re getting pushback from folks who don’t seem happy that we’re here. Folks have gotten keen to our haunts and started sending out squads to hit our ships. You down to visit a few of those spots to show that we won’t be scared off? 

If so, start by seeing what’s around the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD. From there I’ll guide you to a few other hotspots that we need checked. Better get your shit in order before heading out. I'd recommend loading up on ammo and convincing <EM4>two friends</EM4> to join the patrol.

You do this for the Headhunters and I'll see to it that the main contractor gets a bonus of <EM4>18 Council Scrip</EM4>. 

Stows out.

contracts.title: Stand Our Ground
contracts.description:

contracts.title: Starfighter Inferno Special
contracts.description: Starfighter Inferno good ship, but what if you want it to be better ship at fighting? Wikelo knows just what to do. You bring me the items and I make it for you. Bye.

itemRewards.name: Crusader Ares Star Fighter Inferno Wikelo War Special

contracts.title: Starlifter A2 War Mod
contracts.description: Bring Wikelo the things and I make you A2 Starlifter that fights better. Does war so good make you call it A1! Bye.

itemRewards.name: Crusader A2 Hercules Starlifter Wikelo War Special

contracts.title: Still Looking for Work?
contracts.description:
Due to a corporate restructuring, Foxwell has some new vacancies that need to be filled immediately. Foxwell knows you’ve previously expressed interest in this line of work, and we’re wondering if you would want to take another crack at a contract.

One of our clients needs support at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> where their security forces are struggling to handle an outlaw incursion. Head there and help the local forces get rid of the problem before it’s too late. 

Successfully complete this contract, and Foxwell would be happy to send more work your way.

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

requiredIntros.title: Exciting New Opportunities with Foxwell Enforcement

contracts.title: Stock Taking
contracts.description:
I won’t bore you with the details, all you need to know is: one of our haulers got attacked and now our goods are sitting in a freight elevator at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. 

Up to you how you get the goods out, but if you happen to ghost a few of our rivals in the process, I ain’t complaining. Once you’ve got the stuff take it to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>, then we can sort your payment. 

A <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> would also be smart to bring along. 

Stows out.

contracts.title: Stop Attack at [LOCATION]
contracts.description:
Looking for someone who can not only dogfight but recruit others to the Headhunters cause. Our operations center at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, along with any ships going to and from it, are being targeted by hostile forces. We need support there pronto. 

Not gonna lie, but there’s lots of heat around there. That’s why you’ll need to be fully supplied and find some trustworthy friends to fly at your wing. When you get your crew together, head out there and I’ll update you if there’s any flare ups in the area that need your attention.

This op needs to go off without a hitch, so I’m offering the main contractor a bonus <EM4>18 Council Scrip</EM4> for a job well done. 

Stows out.

contracts.title: Stop Attack at [LOCATION]
contracts.description:
Looking for someone who can not only dogfight but recruit others to the Headhunters cause. Our operations center at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, along with any ships going to and from it, are being targeted by hostile forces. We need support there pronto.
