contracts.title: Stop Attack on High-Profile Client
contracts.description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Defend Ship
APPROVAL CODE = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

A high-profile client decided to tour Nyx system but got jumped by hostile ships around <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. 

Sounds like they’re overwhelmed. Any chance you could head to their location and provide support? 

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

contracts.title: Stop Deadly Ship Attack
contracts.description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Defend Ship
APPROVAL CODE = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Despite our warnings, a client decided to fly to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Unsurprisingly, they just dropped a rescue beacon in the area, so we’re looking for a contractor to get on site, assess the situation, and hopefully rescue the client.

We warned them that extremely dangerous and well-equipped outlaws often strike ships there. That’s exactly what I assume happened here, so make sure you plan accordingly.  

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

contracts.title: Stop Rivals from Launching Heist
contracts.description:
When will people learn that they can't just do whatever they feel like on Headhunter turf? These idiots are planning a big job and thought that I'd just let them get away with it? No way in hell.

I want you to fly to [LOCATION] and destroy their fuel tanks and data servers. Show them what the Headhunters really think of them.

Let's see them try to pull off anything after that.

-Stows out

contracts.title: Support Client Under Attack
contracts.description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Defend Ship
APPROVAL CODE = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

One of our clients got the brilliant idea to test their dogfighting skills in a real world scenario. Doesn’t sound like it’s going well, because they comm’d us asking for some support. 

Head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and help clean up the mess they created.

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

contracts.title: Surprise Party
contracts.description:
Some numskull flying a <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> was caught spying on our ops. We ran ‘em off with a warning only to spot ‘em doing the same shit someplace else. Since they didn’t get the message, seems we gotta send a stronger one.    

There’s an emission cloud near <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> that they fly by frequently. Primo place to power down, hide, and launch a surprise attack. Sometimes they fly solo, sometimes there’s other single-seaters with them. It’ll be all you for that first hit, but we’ll put some support ships nearby to help finish the job. 

And if you needed some extra motivation, there's a bonus of <EM4>1 Council Scrip</EM4> for the main contractor at the end of the job. 

Stows out.

contracts.title: Surprise Party
contracts.description:
Some numskull flying a <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> was caught spying on our ops. We ran ‘em off with a warning only to spot ‘em doing the same shit someplace else. Since they didn’t get the message, seems we gotta send a stronger one.    

There’s an emission cloud near <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> that they fly by frequently. Primo place to power down, hide, and launch a surprise attack. Sometimes they fly solo, sometimes there’s other single-seaters with them. It’ll be all you for that first hit, but we’ll put some support ships nearby to help finish the job. 

And if you needed some extra motivation, there's a bonus of <EM4>1 Council Scrip</EM4> for the main contractor at the end of the job. 

Stows out.

contracts.title: Suspect Apprehension Certification
contracts.description:
Hi,

Hope you don't mind, but I was made aware of your Bounty Hunters Guild status and wanted to reach out and see if you'd be interested in contracting with Northrock Service Group, one of the top rated private security firms in the system.

If you are, the first step would be to complete a pro tem suspect apprehension. It's less of an evaluation and more of a chance to make sure that we can have a good working relationship. 

The suspect you would be after is known as <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>. They are known to be particularly elusive so you may have your work cut out for you.

Hope to hear from you soon, 

Braden Corchado
Logistics Officer - Stanton Branch
Northrock Service Group

contracts.title: Sweep and Clear Location
contracts.description:
Looking for someone willing to take out the trash at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Guess a gang has settled in without the permission of the owners. So they’ve hired us to get them out whatever way we see fit. 

I’d bring plenty of ammo, if I were you. Doubt they’ll want to leave willingly. 

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

requiredIntros.title: Exciting New Opportunities with Foxwell Enforcement

contracts.title: Sweep and clear some CFP haunts
contracts.description:
Got word from my Judge that we're to take back some of the outposts that CFP have taken over. They're a little pissed that CFP's getting as much of a foothold in the system as they are and think it's making the Headhunters look weak.

Found a couple candidates near [LOCATION] that could use a sweep. Icing on the cake is that the head of security there is [TARGET]. Not sure if you've heard of 'em, but they shot up a handful of Clips last month, so it's a win-win. Get some territory back and punch out someone who could really stand to get got.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Swiftly Salvage XenoThreat [SHIP]
contracts.description:
One of our crews took out a XenoThreat [SHIP] near [LOCATION]. We don’t want news of this attack getting back to those bastards. Who knows what they’ll do in retaliation? 

Also, we don’t want to give Xenos the chance to salvage their ship so we’re looking to sell the precise location to someone who can get there fast, pick it clean, and leave no trace of what happened. It’ll be worth your while if you hustle there and work fast. 

Stows out.

contracts.title: Tactical Strike
contracts.description:
Some folks don’t seem happy with us. Got word that several sub-capital ships and a number of escorts are targeting our ops. Figured the best way to keep ‘em from causing us trouble is to hit them before they hit us. 

We got eyes on a <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> that’s part of this squad, and it looks like they regularly pass by <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, a spot tailor made for a surprise attack. A nearby emission cloud can hide you and anyone you bring along for muscle.

No sugarcoating it. This ain’t gonna be easy. But the payoff should make it worth your while. Finish the job and the main contractor gets a bonus <EM4>12 Council Scrip</EM4>. 

Plus, who knows what kinda good stuff you’ll find floating in all that wreckage.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Tactical Strike
contracts.description:
Some folks don’t seem happy with us. Got word that several sub-capital ships and a number of escorts are targeting our ops. Figured the best way to keep ‘em from causing us trouble is to hit them before they hit us. 

We got eyes on a <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> that’s part of this squad, and it looks like they regularly pass by <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, a spot tailor made for a surprise attack. A nearby emission cloud can hide you and anyone you bring along for muscle.

No sugarcoating it. This ain’t gonna be easy. But the payoff should make it worth your while. Finish the job and the main contractor gets a bonus <EM4>12 Council Scrip</EM4>. 

Plus, who knows what kinda good stuff you’ll find floating in all that wreckage.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Take a Stand Against Citizens for Prosperity
contracts.description:
I know you've been doing work all over the system, but now it's time for you to decide who you really want to be with. Either keep working with those Citizens for Prosperity limpwads, or prove yourself worthy of being a Headhunter. 

If you're up for it, show us that you've got what it takes by destroying the CFP servers at [LOCATION].

Think you can handle it?

-Stows

contracts.title: Take Out Citizens for Prosperity Fuel Supply
contracts.description:
It seems like I can't go a day without waking up to one of my people bitchin' and moanin' about how hard Citizens for Prosperity is making their life. 

Eventually we're going wipe those do-gooders out of the system, but for now I'll settle for some peace and quiet. 

Go to [LOCATION] and destroy the fuel stores CFP have got there. That should at least keep them out of our business for a bit.

-Stows out

contracts.title: Take Out Citizens for Prosperity Fuel Supply
contracts.description:
It seems like I can't go a day without waking up to one of my people bitchin' and moanin' about how hard Citizens for Prosperity is making their life. 

Eventually we're going wipe those do-gooders out of the system, but for now I'll settle for some peace and quiet. 

Go to [LOCATION] and destroy the fuel stores CFP have got there. That should at least keep them out of our business for a bit.

-Stows out

contracts.title: Take Outlaws at [LOCATION] Offline
contracts.description:
We have gotten word that the outlaws at [LOCATION] have begun recruiting with the hopes of launching a raid against Citizens for Prosperity. 

In order to deescalate the situation before it gets out of hand, we would like you to disable their power generators and halt their expansion. 

Pull this off and it could save a lot of lives.
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Taking back from the Headhunters
contracts.description:
We are currently looking for any qualified and available security operatives to head out to [LOCATION] and reclaim a CFP installation that had been taken by Headhunters. 

The group that's currently occupying the outpost is being led by [TARGET], a Headhunter of some note who's had a history of aggression against locals and CFP volunteers.

We need all Headhunters secured and [TARGET] taken out.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Taking Back Our Goods
contracts.description:
Some upstarts hit my hauling crew on their way to do a delivery. Our tracker is telling us that our ship’s still located at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> so I need you to head over there and get the cargo. You’ll need <EM4>a heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to lug the goods from the ship.

I’d bet that whoever attacked us is still there waiting. Arm up, bring your crew, and if you can, give them one from me.

Once you’ve taken back our goods, drop it off at the freight elevator located at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

-Twitch

contracts.title: Taking down a XenoThreat Hideout
contracts.description:
Got a juicy assignment for any big-time enforcers who want to clear a big payday. Over at [LOCATION] we got some XenoThreat turf run by a real bastard named [TARGET]. Now if you've been in the system long enough, you've probably either heard of [TARGET] or at least seen their work. Skag has a tendency to leaves bodies wherever they go.

Anyway, Judge wants this area swept clean, that means you gotta hit all three clusters and kill every XenoThreat dirt you find. Kill enough and [TARGET] won't be able to hide.

Take them all out and have one on us.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Taking out some XenoThreat trash
contracts.description:
Just got clearance from my Judge to start banging back against XenoThreat. Been eyeballing some spots under their control near [LOCATION].

I'll give you the targets to hit, you kill everyone you find. Hell, I'd love to go myself, sounds like fun.

-Stows

contracts.title: Taking what’s ours
contracts.description:
Managed to intercept a ship carrying some goods over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> but we hit a snag - our guys didn’t have enough space in their ships to store it. You wanna make some quick creds? Head over there and grab the stuff. Could be a few scavs there by now so be on your guard.

Just don’t forget to bring a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> as that shit’s heavy.

When you’re done, drop it off at the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and we’ll take care of the rest.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Taking XenoThreat Turf
contracts.description:
Need some good soldiers with a taste for violence to hit some XenoThreat hideouts located around [LOCATION]. I'll get you the specifics if you're down, but you'll have to wipe out two separate clusters of hideouts. 

We've also gotten word that [TARGET] is lurking around down there. If you take out enough XenoThreat dirtbags, they'll pop they're head up. 

When they do, put a round in it.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Target at [LOCATION]
contracts.description:
There's a nest that needs to be taken out around [LOCATION] that has been taken over by some squatters. We don't care about most of them, but word's gotten back to us that they're sheltering [TARGET] who has a long history of stealing Headhunter loot. Time's come to take them out.

Word is that [TARGET] is in a ship, but may rely on the base's defenses to protect them, so be careful. You kill 'em, you get paid. 

You know, the usual.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Target takedown for a fast track in
contracts.description:
So here's the deal, Headhunters are looking to expand their talent pool and have a few openings for anyone who's got the stones.

There's a real piece of work named [TARGET] who thinks they've been really clever pinching cargo off of haulers moving through the system. We asked for a cut of their profits as a licensing tax to continue operating. When [TARGET] responded, they were very disrespectful.

We've tracked their ship to [LOCATION] and need them taken out. You should know, they're being smart and sticking close to some allies so they won't be alone.

Do this and we'll consider you for future Headhunter work.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Teach Citizens for Prosperity A Lesson
contracts.description:
Every day it seems like Citizens for Prosperity is out here trying to snatch up more people for their shitty little cause and make life more difficult for hardworkin' folks like ourselves. 

I figure they could use a reminder about who really is in charge here. Head to [LOCATION] and bomb the living hell out of the area. 

Nothing like a bit of property damage to get a point across.

-Stows out

contracts.title: Terrorist [TARGET] to be Neutralized
contracts.description:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Outlaws
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ships
Briefing: InterSec has identified more outlaws who are planning an operation against UEE interests from within Nyx. Your mission will be to neutralize this potential threat before they can enact their plans.

Travel to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and dispatch the leader of these outlaws, <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> without hesitation. We have scouted a small number of ships, but our report suggest these are competent pilots - <EM4>bringing back up is advised.</EM4>

Remember that eliminating these outlaws not only serves the people of Nyx, but the UEE too.

Respectfully,

Deacon Tobin
Operations Manager
InterSec Defense Solutions

This communication consists of a non-binding offer that upon acceptance may be immediately terminated by either party without any given notice. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to system law where applicable.

contracts.title: Test Armor
contracts.description: Bring me armor and other things and I give you special test armor. First version. Very special. Bring and I give. Bye.

contracts.title: The System Needs Your Help
contracts.description:
I'm going to level with you. This system is on the precipice of collapsing into complete chaos. I don't know how you feel about Citizens for Prosperity, but all we're trying to do is bring a degree of safety to the people who live here. 

Over at [LOCATION], Headhunters have been killing our volunteers and local civilians without provocation. Their only crime is that they've been accepting CFP supplies. 

I don't know you. I don't know what you've had to endure to survive. But I have to hope that you can see a better future. I believe that's something that all living things yearn for. 

Help us take the facility back so we can work to build that future. It won't be easy, but it's the right thing to do.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: They Will Be Missed
contracts.description:
A senior security official by the name of [TARGET] is about to have their long career come to a very violent and sudden end. While they are currently at [LOCATION], they will not be easy to get to. I fear that a bit of work will be required to draw them out.  

I recommend killing enough of their underlings that they will be forced to face you personally. Of course, once they do decide to finally show their face, it should be a rather straightforward matter. 

Earnestly,
Vaughn

contracts.title: They Will Be Missed
contracts.description:
A security officer by the name of [TARGET] is in desperate need of an early retirement. They are currently stationed at [LOCATION] along with a host of other eager types in uniforms. 

Feel free to indulge your violent whims, but it is only the death of [TARGET] which will earn you my credit and thanks.

Earnestly,
Vaughn

contracts.title: Time to roll on CFP
contracts.description:
Looking for anyone with an itchy trigger finger. We're looking to move against some CFP at  [LOCATION] and take it for ourselves. You gotta play this smart though. There are a bunch of satellite outposts around the main one and all of 'em got security, so you should take out each of these before you take the main base.

But hey, if you wanna jump right in the deep end and fight off all the reinforcements, that's on you. As long as you get it done.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Time to Teach a Lesson
contracts.description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Ship Ambush
APPROVAL CODE = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

A client of ours has been receiving anonymous threats in an attempt to blackmail them, and after a bit of leg work on our part, we’ve managed to trace it back to an individual who pilots a particular <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>. The client wants us to take care of this blackmailer before they have a chance to make good. 

Based on our assessment, the target shouldn’t be too difficult to handle. They fly by <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> on the regular, which has an <EM4>emission cloud</EM4> that’s an ideal spot to power down your ship and lie in wait. Sometimes the target is alone but they often travel with other single-seat ships as protection. Best be strategic when you launch your ambush or the <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> could have a chance to get away. We don’t want to lose this one. We’ll alert other contractors in the area of the ambush so they can come help once it pops off.     

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract. The client has also added a bonus payment of <EM4>3 MG Scrip</EM4> for the main contractor.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

contracts.title: Too Smart For Our Own Good
contracts.description:
We were a little too smart with this one and it’s kinda backfired. Sometimes you gotta dream big, you know? Anyway. we were looking to move some encrypted data to one of our data havens and decided to hide it in a ship’s blackbox. They filled the ship with “valuable” stuff as a decoy in case it got attacked. The plan worked a little too well and the cargo might have attracted the wrong kind of attention. They stole all the cargo but missed the blackbox. Bad news is the ship is now swarming with outlaws.

The data on that blackbox is useless to them, but we need it. If you can get it back for us, we can give you a nice cut from what we make. Seems like a fair deal, right?

Head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and after you’ve done your thing take the flight recorder to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

-Bit Zeros

contracts.title: Top Tier Operator Needed
contracts.description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Escort Ship
Approval code: = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

This contract should only be considered by the most capable of pilots. A highly valued client is currently under attack at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and requires immediate extraction. They’re sitting in the hangar ready to leave, but are unable to move until the hostile ships in the area have been neutralized. 

I don’t see the outlaws stopping any time soon and our client’s reporting they’re packing high-grade weaponry on their ships. This will be a test of your skill as much as your endurance. Assemble whoever you need and head there immediately to assist them.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

contracts.title: Track Down [TARGET]
contracts.description:
Looking to execute a bounty on <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>. We’ve learned that they’re currently hiding out with some confederates at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. 

I’d be prepared to deal with the lowlifes hanging around <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>, but our only real concern is that you land the target. 
    

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

requiredIntros.title: Exciting New Opportunities with Foxwell Enforcement

contracts.title: Tracker Beginner's Permit Certification
contracts.description:
--------------------------------------------------------
----------------- BOUNTY CONTRACT -----------------
--------------------------------------------------------

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
PROCESSING & DISTRIBUTION

The Bounty Hunters Guild has authorized an official bounty.

NAME: [TARGET] 
SYSTEM: Stanton 
RISK ASSESSMENT: Low
LAST KNOWN LOCATION: [LOCATION]
KNOWN AFFILIATIONS: <None>
NOTES: Based on an assessment of your developing abilities, the Bounty Hunters Guild would like to offer you the chance to earn your Tracker Beginner's Permit.

This permit would signify that you are qualified to track and apprehend Low-Risk Targets (LRT). These criminals traditionally fly smaller ships but typically have a few escorts which makes them more challenging.

To successfully complete this certification process, you must apprehend a LRT ranked criminal by the name of <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> last seen at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>.

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
In Pursuit of Justice

The Bounty Hunters Guild is a security service sanctioned by the Mercenary Guild and authorized to operate in both the UEE and beyond in accordance with Xenotrade Authority Acts.

contracts.title: Tracker License Certification
contracts.description:
--------------------------------------------------------
----------------- BOUNTY CONTRACT -----------------
--------------------------------------------------------

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
PROCESSING & DISTRIBUTION

The Bounty Hunters Guild has authorized an official bounty.

NAME: [TARGET] 
SYSTEM: Stanton 
RISK ASSESSMENT: Moderate
LAST KNOWN LOCATION: [LOCATION]
KNOWN AFFILIATIONS: <None>
NOTES: With the progress you have made in developing your skills, the Bounty Hunters Guild would like to offer you the chance to earn your full Tracker License.

This license would signify that you are qualified to track and apprehend Moderate-Risk Targets (MRT). These criminals traditionally fly medium-sized ships with several escorts. This class of outlaws make up a bulk of the contracts that typical bounty hunters will encounter.

To successfully complete this certification process, you must apprehend a MRT ranked criminal by the name of <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> last seen at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>.

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
In Pursuit of Justice

The Bounty Hunters Guild is a security service sanctioned by the Mercenary Guild and authorized to operate in both the UEE and beyond in accordance with Xenotrade Authority Acts.

contracts.title: Trade Council Scrip for Favors?
contracts.description:
If you want other way to get <EM4>favors</EM4> from Wikelo, have thing for you. Wikelo have need for <EM4>scrip</EM4> given out by Council group. Wikelo not part of thief souli, but has business from time to time.

If you bring scrips to <EM4>[DESTINATIONS]</EM4>, will trade for favor.

Bye.

contracts.title: Trade Merc Scrip for Favors?
contracts.description:
Wikelo has another way to get <EM4>favors</EM4> if you interested. 

Your Mercenary souli has <EM4>scrip</EM4> metal, used like favors, but made of very interesting metal that Wikelo need for new project.

If you bring scrips to <EM4>[DESTINATIONS]</EM4>, will trade for favor.

Bye.

contracts.title: Trade Worm Parts for Favors?
contracts.description:
Have new way to get <EM4>favors</EM4> from Wikelo. Hear much about worm things in radiation storms. Made up of many interesting parts that Wikelo find use for. 

If you bring parts to <EM4>[DESTINATIONS]</EM4>, will trade for favor.

Bye.

contracts.title: Trainee Hauler Needed for Direct Small Shipment
contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------  

Need a pilot for a waste material transfer going from the freight elevator at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. Should be easy enough as long as you got a ship that can handle containers up to <EM4>4 SCU</EM4> in size. Wouldn't bring your cleanest ship either.

On the bright side though, most likely outlaws will leave you alone when they see what you're carrying. And don't forget to pack a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to bring along.

contracts.title: Trainee Hauler Needed for Direct Small Shipment
contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------  

Need a pilot for a straightforward haul going from the freight elevator at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. Should be easy enough as long as you got a ship that can handle containers up to <EM4>4 SCU</EM4> in size. 

Credits don't come much easier than this. Just be careful as the route's not exactly in the safest of sectors. And don't forget to pack a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to bring along.

contracts.title: Treat yourself to a fight
contracts.description:
Another gang tried to make a move and carve out some territory for themselves. They failed but Headhunters don't forget. We've taken out most of them but one of the last members named [TARGET] has been spotted flying around [LOCATION].

Odds are they're getting desperate, so don't underestimate them in the fight.

You'll get paid when it's done.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Tricky Ambush
contracts.description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Ship Ambush
APPROVAL CODE = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Looking for a competent contractor who can recruit a wingman to help execute an ambush. The target is a <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> which has been involved in several operations against one of our most important clients. By neutralizing it once and for all, it’ll make our client’s life a hell of a lot easier. While the [TARGET] is our focus, they usually don’t fly anywhere without a sizable escort, including large craft. 

We’ve gotten word that this group will be passing by <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> soon. Any chance you could hurry and beat them there? That spot has an <EM4>emission cloud</EM4> that you can power down your ship and hide in. Then when they pass, you should have the upper hand.  

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract. The client knows this one will be tough, so they threw in a bonus payment of <EM4>8 MG Scrip</EM4> that’ll go to the main contractor.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

contracts.title: Turf War
contracts.description:
One of our Judges caught wind of XenoThreat trying to move in on our territory. Seems like they’re trying to take over [LOCATION]. We don’t want to let those psychos get any more of a foothold in system than they already have, so we’re putting some creds on the line to get ‘em to back off.

We want you to come down on them hard. Don’t let up till the whole place is a graveyard. We’ll send your payment once the bodies are ready to bury.

- Stows out.

contracts.title: Turn Things to Favor
contracts.description:
Maybe Wikelo not have something you want made (that strange, but okay). Old souli would give out <EM4>favors</EM4>, very good way to prove that you do work for me. Collect enough and trade when I have something you want.

Bring things to <EM4>[DESTINATIONS]</EM4> and will trade for favor.

Bye.

contracts.title: Tutorial: ArcCorp (Part 1/3)
contracts.description:
Congratulations on taking your first steps into the universe!

Over the course of this tutorial, you’ll learn how to get around both on foot and in space. 

First up is helping you familiarize yourself with some basic movement controls and the use of your mobiGlas while still inside your “Hab” (or habitation). Follow the objectives and hints on your HUD (heads-up display) to proceed through this mission.

contracts.title: Tutorial: ArcCorp (Part 2/3)
contracts.description:
Well done!

With the first part behind you, you should now have some basic familiarity with the movement controls, managing your hunger and thirst, and some of the core functionality of your mobiGlas – namely the Contract Manager and your Journal.

This next section will help you familiarize yourself with [LOCATION] and take you to visit [STORENAME], a weapons store here in [LOCATION].

You can shop there, and at other stores like it, using United Earth Credits (UEC). During the Alpha phase of Star Citizen’s development, we will be using a currency called aUEC (Alpha United Earth Credits). This is a temporary currency specifically designed for testing the in-game economy and balance.

contracts.title: Tutorial: ArcCorp (Part 3/3)
contracts.description:
You’re almost through with the tutorial. All that remains is to take flight!

With your business in [LOCATION] finished, it’s time to leave the city – and eventually the planet. Make your way to the [TRANSITNAMESHORT] transit shuttles. These shuttles can take you all around [LOCATION] – but your destination is the spaceport, where an Anvil C8 Pisces has been temporarily provided for you.

This snub scouting ship is a great starter vessel, perfect for new pilots looking to get their wings.

contracts.title: Upgrade Intrepid
contracts.description: If you are looking for Intrepid ship that more intrepid. Wikelo can help. Bring things and you will get special touches on ship by Wikelo and pretty new coat to it. Bye.

contracts.title: URGENT: Boarding Action In Progress
contracts.description:
An executive client just informed us that their 890 Jump had been intercepted at [LOCATION] and boarded by outlaws. They would prefer to have this handled privately owing to the sensitive nature of proprietary data that's being stored aboard. 

Your first priority will be to clear all outlaws as quickly as possible so that a recovery team can be dispatched to return the ship to the owner. The longer the outlaws have control of the vessel, the higher the chance it will be lost. I recommend you acquire a team for this outing to expedite matters. 

Note that thanks to a small contingent of Security Personnel who stayed aboard, all surviving members of the crew were able to flee in an escape craft. The current status of the remaining security is unknown, but just in case, keep an eye out for friendlies when you engage the hostiles.

Secondly, if at all possible, the client is *very* interested in preventing the theft of the aforementioned data. If you are able to stop the theft of their confidential data stores before they are transmitted, a generous bonus will be issued.

Needless to say, this is a client I would very much like to keep happy. 

Braden Corchado
Logistics Officer - Stanton Branch
Northrock Service Group

contracts.title: Vanduul-Tech Smugglers
contracts.description:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Unknown
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ship, Personal Arms
Briefing: InterSec has been enlisted by the UEE to gather intel on a group of <EM4>black marketeers dealing in Vanduul parts</EM4>, that have been linked to the illegal Vanduul experiments happening at ASD’s Onyx Facility. The UEE is eager to understand and put an end to their operations.

Based on evidence extracted from the ASD facilities, we’ve potentially managed to track down the location of one of their storage sites.

Once accepted, head over to the old <EM4>QV Planet Services Logistics station</EM4> and we’ll be in touch.

Respectfully, 

Deacon Tobin
Operations Manager
InterSec Defense Solutions

This communication consists of confidential information solely intended for the recipient. Please disregard if received in error and notify sender. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to UEE and system law where applicable.

contracts.title: Verify Deceased Criminal: [TARGET]
contracts.description:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #MP70001
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
In need of a highly competent operator for a special assignment. A highly dangerous outlaw that has been evading local authorities for some time has been reported to have been involved in a large-scale ship battle, resulting in their supposed death. Our client wishes to confirm that they have been neutralized.

Contract Investigator Actions:
We require you to head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> locate <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>’s body and confirm their death.

Additional Notes:
Serious preparation is advised for this contract as there is a strong potential for there to be highly aggressive and dangerous hostiles still on site. Arm yourself accordingly and consider bring other skilled pilots with you.

contracts.title: Very Hungry
contracts.description:
You humans keep Wikelo very busy. Work more than when I at old souli. But Wikelo very hungry now and can't get food.

Please help. Bring food and drink to Wikelo Emporium at <EM4>[DESTINATIONS]</EM4>.

Very appreciate your help. Will give thing in return.

Bye.

resource.name: Ermer Family Farms Fat Free Ice Cream

contracts.title: VIP Client Needs Protection
contracts.description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Escort Ship
Approval code: = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

In need of a contractor who can report in now. A client has found themselves in hot water over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and a protection detail to get away from an asteroid base. They’ve reported multiple, well-armed hostile ships meaning you’ll need a crew of your own to deal with them. Based on the client’s account, these attackers seem highly motivated so they will likely not back down easily.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

contracts.title: Vital Resources Needed For Research
contracts.description:
To all available contractors,

Rayari scientists are hard at work trying to solve the issues with failing regen tech. Currently, their efforts are hindered by a lack of three resources essential for their experiments: <EM4>saldynium, jaclium, and carinite</EM4>.  

In particular, our scientists at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> have had to put their work on hold after running out of those resources. With a restock from our normal provider not possible for months owing to short supply, we’ll pay a premium to anyone who can assist with restocking the materials.

Though we haven’t been able to do thorough scans, there’s a strong belief among our teams that Hathor’s defunct Orbital Laser Platforms were built above areas with a high concentration of these resources. Reactivating these OLP could be your best hope of acquiring what we need.

Together we can make the universe better for all.

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing

contracts.title: Wanna be a Headhunter?
contracts.description:
You know us. You know what we do. System’s getting a little crowded, so we’re looking for some good soldiers to help keep our place here.

If you’re up for it and don’t mind getting your hands dirty, we’ve got something to prove you’ve got the stuff we’re looking for.

[TARGET] was a former member who sold us out to XenoThreat and got some of their brothers and sisters killed. Now they think they can just live their life without consequence.

You take them out. You get boosted in. Sounds like a fair trade.

They’ve been spotted around [LOCATION], so get there and take care of it.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Want Polaris? Need something special.
contracts.description:
Wikelo need large amounts of <EM4>quantanium</EM4> and is willing to give you nice Polaris in exchange but also know many humans not have much space, so you trade as you go. Wikelo will you <EM4>Polaris bits</EM4> if you want trade quantanium. Work like favors. Help Wikelo remember how much you give. 

Bring quantanium to <EM4>[DESTINATIONS]</EM4> and will trade for bits.

Bye.

contracts.title: Want Taurus ship
contracts.description: Wikelo came across plans to build Constellation Taurus ship. Nice ship, but Wikelo make a little better. Prettier too. If you want, bring stuff.

itemRewards.name: RSI Constellation Taurus Wikelo War Special

contracts.title: Wanted: [TARGET]
contracts.description:
We got a greenlight to finally take out [TARGET]. They've been a pain in our ass ever since they came to the system a few years ago and it's finally time to take them out once and for all. 

We've gotten word that [TARGET] was spotted flying near [LOCATION] and the Judge wants this handled now.

Take 'em out.

- Stows out.

contracts.title: Wanted: [TARGET]
contracts.description:
Here's the deal, we just got word that a XenoThreat power player named [TARGET] just came out of hiding and was spotted at [LOCATION]. 

Headhunters have been hungry to put this asshole in the ground for months, so we launched an assault against the outpost, but the Judge wants to make sure [TARGET] doesn't slip away, so they want to use you as insurance.

This'll be a tough kill in the middle of a warzone, but we'll pay out if you pull it off.

Stows out.

contracts.title: What is Terrapin?
contracts.description: Wikelo not know this Human word but ship is very useful when things go danger. If you want, can give new version of it. Maybe more useful?\n\nYou fly and tell. Bye.

itemRewards.name: Anvil Terrapin Medic Wikelo Savior Special

contracts.title: Where Wolf? Here Wolf
contracts.description: If you want to be quiet and surprise people, this is the Wolf you want. Wikelo mod it to be extra stealth. Trade you for it when you bring me the items I want.

itemRewards.name: Kruger L-21 Wolf Wikelo Sneak Special

contracts.title: Wikelo Arrive to System
contracts.description:
Hello, I am Wikelo. Recent addition to your system and very excited to be here. Spent many time here in UEE and happy to spent more.

Have place where I make things from other things.

Need person to bring me useful things to finish project I work on. You have list. Get, please. I am at <EM4>[DESTINATIONS]</EM4>.

Will give you item for your help.

Also, when done, if you want to do more. Have many things can make in my humble shop. Come, look at pretty poster and then decide what you want me to make.

Bye.

contracts.title: Wikelo Navy F7
contracts.description: Know how much you Humans like Navy so Wikelo have one now. If you want Wikelo version of F7 mk2, bring me things and you are in. Very funny. Bye.

contracts.title: Wipe Citizens for Prosperity Data Farm
contracts.description:
Turns out those Citizens for Prosperity bastards have been gathering intel on us. They're going to try to cut us off from several revenue streams and bleed us dry. Can't let that happen. 

Head to [LOCATION] and destroy their data storage. 

That should teach them not to stick their noses where they don't belong.

-Stows out

contracts.title: Wipe Out XenoThreat Servers
contracts.description:
Something just fell into my lap that is way too good to pass up. XenoThreat's intelligence gathering is a bit of legend in the circles I run in and it turns out that they're storing a whole heap of their best intel at [LOCATION].

Would be a shame if someone, say like you, were to go there and blow it all up, huh? 

-Stows out

contracts.title: Wipe Out XenoThreat Servers
contracts.description:
Something just fell into my lap that is way too good to pass up. XenoThreat's intelligence gathering is a bit of legend in the circles I run in and it turns out that they're storing a whole heap of their best intel at [LOCATION].

Would be a shame if someone, say like you, were to go there and blow it all up, huh? 

-Stows out

contracts.title: Worth the trouble
contracts.description:
This’ll be a fun one for you. We just got word that a transport ship has broken down at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Only problem is, every skag and their mother seems to know about it. Place is crawling with all kinds of outlaws trying to get their hands on the cargo onboard. That’s where you come in.

If you can get your best pilots together and <EM4>a heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> you can take out the competition and snag the cargo. It ain’t gonna be easy though. One of my scouts said the assholes guarding this ship have got some serious tech on them.  

I’ve already got a buyer waiting, you just need to take the cargo to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and I’ll send you the creds.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Wrecked Ships for Sale
contracts.description:
Had a few wrecked ships towed to [LOCATION]. They’re fully out of commission and in dire need of scrapping. If you’re interested in salvaging what’s left, it can be all yours, for a fair price, too.

Plus, you don’t have to worry much about any distractions while you’re workin’ since you’ll be near one of our stations and we make sure folks behave themselves.

- Smokey

contracts.title: Write Off
contracts.description:
Not sure how the hell this happened, but my pilot’s gone and got themselves killed over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. If you want to die on your own time, that’s your business, but they did it while carrying a stash for me. Now I gotta have someone go out there and finish their work.

Take the two packages to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and I’ll have one of my crew collect it later. If you see those assholes who took out my pilot, give ‘em hell.

-Twitch

contracts.title: XenoThreat = GoodLoot
contracts.description:
You know who probably deserves taking down a peg or two? XenoThreat. 

We pulled some intel off a server that had details of all their upcoming operations, and for the right price, we could send you the exact coordinates of where an XT ship fully loaded with primo cargo is waiting. 

Here’s a little taste of what info we have so you know we’re not messing around. XenoThreat stashed the ship in a locked asteroid base hangar that can only be accessed via the station’s elevators. We can’t get the hangar doors open for you but have adjusted the security protocols so you’ll be able to use a console in the hangar to override the lockdown.  

Interested?

57 65 65 76 69 6c

contracts.title: XenoThreat Lieutenant needs some killing
contracts.description:
Headhunters just rallied up a crew to go hit [LOCATION] and wipe out the XenoThreat there, but I'm looking to add some extra insurance. 

See there's this heavy hitter there named [TARGET] who's up in the XenoThreat command structure and we want them taken out. Every other one you kill is gravy, but they're your prime target.

-Stows

contracts.title: XL Purchase Order: Hand Mined Materials
contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>[SYSTEM] </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for rare materials. We appreciate your help in this matter.

There are only a few known locations where these materials can be sourced, mainly from now defunct Hathor Group sites on <EM4>Daymar and Aberdeen</EM4>. Our suggestion would be to head to the Platform Alignment Facilities (PAF) and attempt to reactivate their Orbital Laser Platform (OLP) to access the materials below the planet's surface.

Reminder, since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>[MULTITOOL]</EM4>.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

[LOCATION] Many of these ores are extremely rare and difficult to find, detectable only when a rock has been cracked open.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: XL Purchase Order: Vehicle Mined Ore
contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>[SYSTEM] </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for rare materials. We appreciate your help in this matter.

There are only a few known locations where these materials can be sourced, mainly from now defunct Hathor Group sites on <EM4>Daymar and Aberdeen</EM4>. Our suggestion would be to head to the Platform Alignment Facilities (PAF) and attempt to reactivate their Orbital Laser Platform (OLP) to access the materials below the planet's surface.

Reminder, since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>[MULTITOOL]</EM4>.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: XS Purchase Order: Ship Mined Ore
contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>[SYSTEM] </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Due to changes in our sourcing pipeline, Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to purchase a variety of refined materials from independent miners operating in the area. While selling at a trade hub may net you a more competitive price than fulfilling our order, many miners find that strengthening their ties to Shubin to be a wise long-term investment for their career.

[LOCATION] For a comprehensive list of where to find these minerals, consult <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #2: Where to Mine</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal. While you're there, feel free to read the first part <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #1: Basic Overview</EM4> if you want a refresher on how to get the materials.

Since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>[MULTITOOL]</EM4>.

Please note that in an effort to expedite future use of these materials, <EM4>they must be refined before delivery</EM4>. This can be done at any refinery, the locations of which can be found in your Starmap.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required refined materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: Yellow Level Contract: Ambush An Amateur
contracts.description:
Care to help us ghost a bad guy? 

We’ve been hired to hunt down an outlaw flying a <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>. Shouldn’t be too hard since they take the same flightpath each day. That makes them a prime target for an ambush if I ever saw one. I’ve analyzed the route and determined that <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> is the ideal spot to strike. There’s an emission cloud there that’ll be perfect to hide your ship’s signature while you wait.   

Job is simple if you’re interested. Head to the location, hide out, power down, and then wait for them to fly by. Sometimes they roll alone but they often have other single-seat ships with them. Shouldn’t be too hard to handle for a pro. Plus, we’ll still have reinforcements nearby and ready to deploy once it pops off.

Pull this off and we'll give the main contractor a bonus payment of <EM4>1 MG Scrip</EM4>.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

contracts.title: Yellow Level Contract: Clear Out PAF
contracts.description:
We’ve been tracking a group of outlaws who’ve been causing trouble for one of our clients. Seems they’ve taken up residence at an old Hathor facility. Don’t know what their plans with that old facility are but our client is eager to have them taken care of.

Looking for someone to go to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and neutralize these targets.

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

requiredIntros.title: Exciting New Opportunities with Foxwell Enforcement

contracts.title: Yellow Level Contract: Defend [LOCATION]
contracts.description:
Ships coming and going from <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> are being targeted by hostile forces. The folks there have hired us to deal with this problem immediately.

Need someone to get there pronto and start fighting off these ships. The situation appears to be constantly evolving, so I’ll keep you updated on where you’re needed most. 

For the hustle and effort, we’ll also be paying a bonus of <EM4>4 MG Scrip</EM4> to the main contractor for dealing with this.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

contracts.title: Yellow Level Contract: Merc Work
contracts.description:
We’ve been following a group of outlaws on behalf of a client, and it looks like they’ve taken a permanent pit stop on an old orbital platform. 

We’re looking for a contractor who can head over to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and neutralize the targets. The platform is crawling with a bunch of armed and dangerous thugs, so we’ve designated this a yellow level contract.

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

requiredIntros.title: Exciting New Opportunities with Foxwell Enforcement

contracts.title: Yellow Level Contract: Routine Patrol
contracts.description:
Time to knock out a routine patrol for one of our long-term clients. The route is a series of waypoints that need to be visited and scanned to confirm everything’s as expected. Should be simple enough.  

If interested, please accept and head to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD to start. Pull this off and the main contractor will get a bonus payment of <EM4>2 MG Scrip.</EM4>

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

contracts.title: Yellow Level Contract: Security Sweep
contracts.description:
Need someone to knock out a security patrol. You’ll need to go to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD and then scan several designated waypoints ensuring that they’re safe and secure. 

Satellites in that region have been acting up recently. Not exactly sure what’s going on out there, but best be prepared in case there’s any trouble.

Complete this contract and the main contractor will get a bonus payment of <EM4>4 MG Scrip.</EM4>

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

contracts.title: Yellow Level Contract: Ship Under Attack
contracts.description:
Foxwell is looking for an available combat pilot to provide immediate assistance to a [SHIP] under attack over by [LOCATION]. We have not identified the perpetrators in the attack, but have been assured it is a small force.

Please dispatch quickly and clear out all hostiles. We need the client to make it through this as they haven't paid us yet.

Good luck,

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

contracts.title: Yellow Level Contract: Stand Up to Aggressors
contracts.description:
Outlaw ships are harassing anyone attempting to land or leave our client’s operations at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Need someone to fly there to defend the site and protect our client’s ships before the situation gets out of control. Get there, get after those aggressors, and I'll keep you updated on the situation. 

Help take care of this and we'll pass along a bonus payment of <EM4>2 MG Scrip</EM4> to the main contractor.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

contracts.title: Yellow Level Contract: Surprise Strike
contracts.description:
An outlaw who’s been on the run finally returned to the system. Seems like they hoped that disappearing for a bit would make us forget about them. They’re not even trying to hide their identity or vary their routine which means we know exactly where they’re going to be.

Latest intel indicates that they’re flying a <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> and will be passing by <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> soon. I’ve already scoped out an emission cloud that’s a perfect place for you to find cover, power down your ship, and wait. Only real variable is if they’ll be alone or not. We’ve heard they sometimes roll with friends that all fly single-seaters. Landing that first surprise strike will be important as this crew is battle-tested, but we’ll have reinforcements at the ready to provide support if you need them.

Get this done and we'll give the main contractor a bonus payment of <EM4>3 MG Scrip</EM4>.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

contracts.title: Yormandi Gun
contracts.description: This gun has picture of amazing creature on side. Use it and it make you big and strong like Yormandi. Spit lightning. Bring my items and then you get it. Bye.

contracts.title: Zeus Cargo Special
contracts.description: Wikelo can make new version of cargo Zeus ship. If you want, bring what needed, then you can have ship. Fair. Bye.

contracts.title: Zeus Special
contracts.description: Wikelo can make new version of Zeus ship. I know it important ship to Human. Not sure why, but yes, very useful ship. Anyway, can upgrade and make a little prettier. What I need listed, if you want, bring. Bye.

itemRewards.name: RSI Zeus Mk II ES Wikelo Work Special

legacyContracts.title: Covalex Cargo Hauling Re-evaluation
legacyContracts.description:
Hey,

Have a bit of good news for you. Covalex recently finished an evaluation of our contractor pool, and decided to reconsider your status as a cargo hauler. To requalify, all you need is to successfully complete the following delivery.

Pick up <EM4>Tungsten</EM4> from a freight elevator at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and deliver it to a freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. In order to complete this haul in a fast and efficient manner, you'll need a ship that can haul <EM4>1 SCU cargo containers</EM4>.

Hopefully everything goes smoothly so we can welcome you back to the team.

By the way, we strongly encourage contractors to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> along.   

Covalex Shipping  
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'

Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.

legacyContracts.title: Experienced Rank - Medium Cargo Haul
legacyContracts.description:
Hi,

Need the trash collected from a few Hurston locations and then taken to a freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. Don't worry, none of the containers are bigger than <EM4>8 SCU</EM4>.

PICK UP LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)

- Freight elevator at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>
- Freight elevator at <EM4>[LOCATION1]</EM4>
- Freight elevator at <EM4>[LOCATION2]</EM4>

Fun fact for you. Hurston is the only planet in Stanton that doesn’t separate their trash and scrap. One of their workers told me that the company did a cost-benefit analysis on it decades ago that determined it wasn’t worth putting a planet-wide system in place to facilitate it. Isn’t that the most Hurston thing ever?   

By the way, we strongly encourage contractors to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> along.   

Thanks in advance for ensuring prompt service,

legacyContracts.description:
Hi there,

There’s a few sites on ArcCorp that need their waste and scrap collected (all boxes <EM4>4 SCU</EM4> or smaller) and taken to a freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. Doesn’t matter what order you do the run, as long as you grab it all.

legacyContracts.description:
Hi,

Need the trash collected from a few Hurston locations and then taken to a freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. Don't worry, none of the containers are bigger than <EM4>8 SCU</EM4>.

PICK UP LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)

- Freight elevator at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>
- Freight elevator at <EM4>[LOCATION1]</EM4>

Fun fact for you. Hurston is the only planet in Stanton that doesn’t separate their trash and scrap. One of their workers told me that the company did a cost-benefit analysis on it decades ago that determined it wasn’t worth putting a planet-wide system in place to facilitate it. Isn’t that the most Hurston thing ever?   

By the way, we strongly encourage contractors to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> along.

legacyContracts.title: Junior Rank - Small Cargo Haul
legacyContracts.description:
Hi there,

There’s a few sites on ArcCorp that need their waste and scrap collected (all boxes <EM4>4 SCU</EM4> or smaller) and taken to a freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. Doesn’t matter what order you do the run, as long as you grab it all.    

PICK UP LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)

- Freight elevator at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>
- Freight elevator at <EM4>[LOCATION1]</EM4>
- Freight elevator at <EM4>[LOCATION2]</EM4>

You know, my mom was a hauler who specialized in runs like this. It might not be the most glamorous stuff, but she claimed these runs had the best pay-to-risk ratio. Pirates never gave her any trouble when they found out what was on board.  

By the way, we strongly encourage contractors to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> along.   

Thanks in advance for ensuring prompt service,

Chase Hewitt
Jr. Logistics Coordinator
Covalex Shipping  
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'

Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.

legacyContracts.title: Junior Rank - Small Cargo Haul
legacyContracts.description:
Hi,

Need the trash collected from a few Hurston locations and then taken to a freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. Don't worry, none of the containers are bigger than <EM4>4 SCU</EM4>.

PICK UP LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)

- Freight elevator at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>
- Freight elevator at <EM4>[LOCATION1]</EM4>
- Freight elevator at <EM4>[LOCATION2]</EM4>

Fun fact for you. Hurston is the only planet in Stanton that doesn’t separate their trash and scrap. One of their workers told me that the company did a cost-benefit analysis on it decades ago that determined it wasn’t worth putting a planet-wide system in place to facilitate it. Isn’t that the most Hurston thing ever?   

By the way, we strongly encourage contractors to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> along.   

Thanks in advance for ensuring prompt service,

legacyContracts.description:
Hi,

Need the trash collected from a few Hurston locations and then taken to a freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. Don't worry, none of the containers are bigger than <EM4>4 SCU</EM4>.

Fun fact for you. Hurston is the only planet in Stanton that doesn’t separate their trash and scrap. Isn’t that the most Hurston thing ever?

legacyContracts.title: Opportunity for Independent Cargo Hauler
legacyContracts.description:
Earning such accolades as 'Imperial Finances' Top 10 Shipping Companies' and 'Delivery Digest's 2945's Most Trusted Transport,' Covalex is busier than ever. And that means more cargo going to more places. That's where you come in.  

Covalex is looking for dependable and industrious pilots to join our expanding family. Do you have access to a ship that can hold <EM4>1 SCU cargo containers</EM4>? Can you pass an Advocacy background check if required? Then a universe of opportunity is waiting for you. 

Simply complete an 'Evaluation Trial’ by picking up a shipment of <EM4>Tungsten</EM4> from a freight elevator at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and successfully delivering it to a freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Upon satisfactory completion, you'll be eligible to become part of Covalex Shipping's vast network of independent transport specialists*.

By the way, we strongly encourage contractors to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> along.   

Covalex Shipping  
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'

*Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.

Need a contractor for a simple cargo haul going from a freight elevator at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> to a freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. At most the containers will be <EM4>8 SCU</EM4> in size. 

Also, we strongly encourage contractors to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> along. 

Any chance you’re available to take care of it for us?

[SIGN_OFF]

Chase Hewitt
Jr. Logistics Coordinator
Covalex Shipping  
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'

Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.

legacyContracts.title: Rookie Rank - Direct Small Cargo Haul
legacyContracts.description:
Hey,

Any interest in doing the Stanton leg of an interstellar run? 

There’s a haul of <EM4>Agricultural Supplies</EM4> waiting in containers <EM4>4 SCU</EM4> or smaller to be picked up from a freight elevator at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and delivered to a freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. No need to take it any further than that. I’ve got someone else lined up to run it through the jump to its final destination. 

By the way, we strongly encourage contractors to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> along.   

Thanks in advance for ensuring prompt service,

Chase Hewitt
Jr. Logistics Coordinator
Covalex Shipping  
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'

To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Need a contractor for a simple cargo haul going from a freight elevator at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> to a freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. At most the containers will be <EM4>4 SCU</EM4> in size. 

Also, we strongly encourage contractors to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> along. 

Any chance you’re available to take care of it for us?

[SIGN_OFF]

Chase Hewitt
Jr. Logistics Coordinator
Covalex Shipping  
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'

Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.

legacyContracts.title: Rookie Rank - Extra Small Cargo Haul
legacyContracts.description:
Hi,

Need the trash collected from a few Hurston locations and then taken to a freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. Don't worry, none of the containers are bigger than <EM4>1 SCU</EM4>.

PICK UP LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)

- Freight elevator at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>
- Freight elevator at <EM4>[LOCATION1]</EM4>

Fun fact for you. Hurston is the only planet in Stanton that doesn’t separate their trash and scrap. One of their workers told me that the company did a cost-benefit analysis on it decades ago that determined it wasn’t worth putting a planet-wide system in place to facilitate it. Isn’t that the most Hurston thing ever?   

By the way, we strongly encourage contractors to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> along.   

Thanks in advance for ensuring prompt service,

Chase Hewitt
Jr. Logistics Coordinator
Covalex Shipping  
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'

Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.

There’s a load of cargo (<EM4>4 SCU</EM4> or smaller) that needs to be delivered to a freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. The only thing is that the cargo is spread across a few locations, which I’ve listed out below.

- Freight elevator at <EM4>[LOCATION1]</EM4>

legacyContracts.title: Rookie Rank - Small Cargo Haul
legacyContracts.description:
Hi there,

There’s a few sites on ArcCorp that need their waste and scrap collected (all boxes <EM4>4 SCU</EM4> or smaller) and taken to a freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. Doesn’t matter what order you do the run, as long as you grab it all.    

PICK UP LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)

- Freight elevator at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>
- Freight elevator at <EM4>[LOCATION1]</EM4>

You know, my mom was a hauler who specialized in runs like this. It might not be the most glamorous stuff, but she claimed these runs had the best pay-to-risk ratio. Pirates never gave her any trouble when they found out what was on board.  

By the way, we strongly encourage contractors to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> along.   

Thanks in advance for ensuring prompt service,

Chase Hewitt
Jr. Logistics Coordinator
Covalex Shipping  
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'

Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.

legacyContracts.title: Rookie Rank - Small Cargo Haul
legacyContracts.description:
Hi,

There’s a load of stims at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> ready to be picked up from a freight elevator and delivered to a few spots. They will be packaged up in containers <EM4>4 SCU</EM4> or smaller. Any chance you can knock this one out for me? 

Doesn’t matter what order you drop them off.    

DROP OFF LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)

- Freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>
- Freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION1]</EM4>

Glad I never picked up the habit myself because I swear I get more delivery update requests for “where are my stims?!?” than any other kind of shipment. 

By the way, we strongly encourage contractors to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> along.   

Thanks in advance for ensuring prompt service,

Chase Hewitt
Jr. Logistics Coordinator
Covalex Shipping  
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'

Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Seems like <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> currently has some <EM4>16 SCU</EM4> or smaller cargo that needs to be separated and delivered to a few different spots. 

DROP OFF LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)

- Freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>
- Freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION1]</EM4>
- Freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION2]</EM4>
- Freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION3]</EM4>

Drop-offs can be done in whatever order works best for you.  

By the way, we strongly encourage contractors to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> along.   

[SIGN_OFF]

Chase Hewitt
Jr. Logistics Coordinator
Covalex Shipping  
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'

Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.

legacyContracts.title: Senior Rank - Medium Cargo Haul
legacyContracts.description:
Hi there,

The refinery at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> has been busy. They’ve processed a bunch of <EM4>Aluminum</EM4> into containers <EM4>16 SCU</EM4> or smaller, and are looking to get it shipped out from a freight elevator. I just checked with the LEOs to see which ones needed this stuff and was able to put together this run.  

DROP OFF LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)

- Freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>
- Freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION1]</EM4>
- Freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION2]</EM4>
- Freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION3]</EM4>

Should be an easy run for you, if you’re free. 

By the way, we strongly encourage contractors to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> along.   

Thanks in advance for ensuring prompt service,

Chase Hewitt
Jr. Logistics Coordinator
Covalex Shipping  
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'

Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.
